items.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
items.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

items.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
items.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

items.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
items.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

items.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
